channel.title: Data Analytics on Matthew Doucette-Frazee Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Data Analytics on Matthew Doucette-Frazee Portfolio

item.title: How I Used Power Apps to Automate Fleet Operations
item.description:
In my role as Fleet Coordinator, I identified inefficiencies in how fleet data was tracked and managed manually.

To solve this, I built a Power Apps solution that:

  • Centralized fleet tracking
  • Automated scheduling
  • Provided real-time visibility

This reduced manual work, improved accuracy, and allowed better decision-making.

This project showed me how powerful automation can be when applied to real business problems.
